After receiving an urgent call about his father's health, James reluctantly returns home to help with the family B&B business. James must learn about sacrificing for the ones he loves, even at the expense of his own dreams.

programme.title: A Royal Surprise
programme.desc: When Riley's boyfriend, Mandla, invites her to South Africa to meet his family, she is shocked to discover that he is a prince. The news puts Riley's trust in Mandla in jeopardy, and he must do what he can to win her love back.

programme.title: Chocolate Covered Christmas
programme.desc: Successful marketing executive Sadie is the daughter of the owners of a traditional chocolate store in small town America. Sadie has trouble asking for help. She discovers that her parents are selling the store and jeopardizing her childhood dreams of inheriting it. Sadie is entrusted to teach the new owner the mysteries of chocolate, and magically, love will cook through the Christmas spirit. Sadie will learn that helping others and asking for help is more fulfilling that succeeding on her own.

programme.title: Mistletoe Mixup
programme.desc: A workaholic with no time for romance, or the holidays ends up meeting two potential suitors on the same day, but unbeknownst to her, they turn out to be brothers. A sibling squabble commences in this holiday romance.

programme.title: Romance In The Air
programme.desc: After learning her marketing job is on the line, Eden returns to Lake Tahoe where she used to spend her summers growing up. Intending to relax and recharge so she can tackle her job again, she is surprised to find her childhood friend and sweetheart Riley is still living next door. She finds purpose in helping Riley propel his struggling hot air balloon tour company, and also finds herself drawn to him and their dear past. However, Eden sees Riley and Tahoe as temporary, while her life—and boyfriend—back home await her. She can't admit that she and Riley could have a future, even if that's exactly what she wants. When she's willing to take a risk for what her heart wants, her life will take off with her true love.

programme.title: Two Crosses at Danger Pass
programme.desc: Judy and Alex are the only two survivors of a punitive mission ordered by the rich and ruthless Moran.... The girl becomes his maid and the boy is adopted by a Quaker family. Alex, despite the philosophy of forgiveness he has been taught, plans to take revenge.

programme.title: I Am Sartana, Trade Your Guns for a Coffin
programme.desc: Sartana, a bounty hunter and gunfighter, witnesses a gold robbery and arrives in a suspicious town run by Samuel Spencer. Hired to protect the next shipment, Sartana fends off numerous incompetent villains, surviving their attempts on his life. Meanwhile, his nemesis, Sabbath—known for his white coat and parasol—arrives in town. With tensions rising, Sartana and Sabbath are headed for a final showdown to settle the score.

programme.title: Viva! Django
programme.desc: Django is on the trail of some renegade outlaws who raped and killed his wife. En route, he rescues a horse thief from an impromptu hanging. He discovers the man knows who committed the murder. The men team up and head west for revenge.

programme.title: Heads or Tails
programme.desc: Shanda is charged with the murder of the banker, Burton and to save her from being lynched, the sheriff sends her off to Phoenix. During the trip the two deputies to whom she's been entrusted rape and leave her in the desert, certain that she's dead. The girl is found by Black Talisman, an outlaw, who takes her to his hideout, nurses her back to health and after hearing her story, determines to avenge her and clear her name.

programme.title: My Name Is Shanghai Joe
programme.desc: A Chinese immigrant, recently arrived in America, fights to free Mexican slaves from their cruel master.

programme.title: Miss Me This Christmas
programme.desc: Regina moves into her friend's suite at The Chesterton Hotel as she waits for her divorce settlement to come through on Christmas Day. While there, she starts a whirlwind romance with a billionaire, who proposes to her.

programme.title: The Christmas Lodge
programme.desc: During a weekend trip to the mountains, Mary finds herself at the now run-down lodge where she spent the holidays with her family growing up. She becomes determined to restore the building to its former glory.

programme.title: The Flight Before Christmas
programme.desc: Starring Mayim Bialik and Ryan McPartlin. Two strangers offer to share the last remaining room at a bed-and-breakfast when a snowstorm strands their flight in Montana on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: A Song for Christmas
programme.desc: Two single parents stumble into the possibility of love for Christmas, only to discover that their daughters are embroiled in a rivalry at school. When the rivalry gets out of control, can hope and healing lead everyone to a peaceful and merry Christmas?

programme.title: Love Notes
programme.desc: Starring Laura Leighton and Antonio Cupo. When a classical music critic becomes pregnant from a brief encounter with a country music star, she decides it is the perfect way for her infertile best friend to have a baby.

programme.title: Our Dream Wedding
programme.desc: Commitment-shy Natalie tries on her grandma's 'magical' wedding veil and is transported to her future, where she and long-term boyfriend Scott are happily married with two beautiful children. Is she finally ready to commit?

programme.title: Clara
programme.desc: An obsessive astronomer and a curious artist form an unlikely bond which leads them to a profound, scientific discovery.

programme.title: Wild Horses
programme.desc: An over-the-hill rodeo champion gets fired from his assembly line job in Texas. He and a buddy then decide to head to Wyoming to get a job herding mustangs. His wife gives him her blessing, knowing he needs to find something which satisfies his spirit.

programme.title: Last Knights
programme.desc: Gladiator meets Game of Thrones in this electrifying epic starring Academy Award winner Morgan Freeman and Academy Award nominee Clive Owen. In an age of honour and justice by the sword Raiden is a fallen warrior who must rise up against a corrupt and sadistic ruler to avenge Bartok, his dishonoured master.

programme.title: Little Lord Fauntleroy
programme.desc: An American boy turns out to be the long-lost heir of a British fortune. He is sent to live with the cold and unsentimental lord who oversees the trust.

programme.title: Mr Wong, Detective
programme.desc: When a chemical manufacturer is killed after asking detective James Wong to help him, Wong investigates this and two subsequent murders. He uncovers an international spy ring hoping to steal the formula for a poison gas being developed by the first victim's company.

programme.title: Mclintock!
programme.desc: Wealthy rancher G.W. McLintock uses his power and influence in the territory to keep the peace between farmers, ranchers, land-grabbers, Indians and corrupt government officials.

programme.title: Metropolis
programme.desc: Incorporating more than 25 minutes of newly discovered footage, this 2010 restoration of METROPOLIS is the definitive edition of Fritz Lang's science fiction masterpiece. Backed by a new recording of Gottfried Huppertz's 1927 score (presented here in 5.1 Stereo Surround), the film's dazzling visual design and special effects are more striking than ever. And the integration of scenes and subplots long considered lost endows METROPOLIS with even greater tension and emotional resonance, as it dramatizes the conflict between wealthy über-capitalists and rebellious subterranean laborers—orchestrated by a diabolical scientist capable of destroying them both.

programme.title: Replicas
programme.desc: A scientist becomes obsessed with bringing back his family members who died in a traffic accident.

programme.title: George And The Dragon
programme.desc: A knight (James Purefoy, "Rome") returning from the Crusades takes on a dragon after the disappearance of the kindly Princess Lunna (Piper Perabo, "Coyote Ugly"). With Patrick Swayze.

programme.title: The Heist
programme.desc: A comedy centered on three museum security guards who devise a plan to steal back the artworks to which they have become attached after they are transferred to another museum. Starring: Morgan Freeman, Christopher Walken, Joseph McKenna, Wynn Everett

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: After years of hiding from a society that shuns him, Hellboy and his team attempt to stop the resurrection of an ancient witch who once spread an unstoppable plague before she was locked away by the legendary King Arthur.

programme.title: The Arrival
programme.desc: Radio astronomer Zane Zaminsky (Charlie Sheen) believes he's picked up a cosmic noise that signals extraterrestrial intelligence. His desperate search for answers leads him to Mexico and a mysterious power plant, where is arrested for the murder of a scientist. Zane must escape with his proof of the world-shattering alien invasion in this intense sci-fi thriller.

programme.title: Sum of Histories
programme.desc: Two physicists discover how to manipulate electrons with quantum tunneling to send emails to the past. With the power to influence the recent past, the temptation to right old wrongs is too great.

programme.title: Time Loop
programme.desc: A young Londoner scientist running experiments with his father in a quite Italian village, has to face the consequences of choices he hasn't made yet.

programme.title: Narcopolis
programme.desc: 2022: London. The world's economic outlook is still precarious and to appease a restless population the authorities have decriminalised all classes of recreational drugs. The ‘Drecks' are an elite unit created by an over-stretched police force to keep the black market dealers off the streets and the licensed drug companies rich.

programme.title: Fatal Defense
programme.desc: A single mother signs up for self-defense classes from a handsome instructor. But he develops a frightening obsession with her and orchestrates an increasing deadly array of "tests" to see if she has truly learned from his lessons.

programme.title: Single & Sexy
programme.desc: Sam (Kevin Sorbo), Nick (Carlos Ponce), and Robert find themselves in a love triangle with Amy (Haley Webb).

programme.title: Joy & Hope
programme.desc: When a handsome author from Manhattan is sent to a rustic ranch in upstate New York, he finds a lot more than inspiration for his next novel.

programme.title: On Angel's Wings
programme.desc: A girl (Taylor Faye Ruffin) takes her brother (Tyler Humphrey) and dog on an adventure after an angel grants her three wishes.

programme.title: Discreet
programme.desc: Monique, a high-class escort, has always given her clients what they wanted, while clean-cut Thomas, has always been what everyone has expected.

programme.title: A Slice of Chicago Romance
programme.desc: In a suburb of Chicago, Romanos & Juliatos, two pizza places, have competed for the town's business for years. When both restaurants get passed down to—RILEY (30s) and SARAH (30s)—after a new pizza chain moves into town, the new bosses struggle to compete after they begin to fall for one another.

programme.title: 10 Years
programme.desc: 10 Years follows a group of friends on the night of their high school reunion who, a decade after leaving school, still haven't quite grown up.

programme.title: Mr. Morgan's Last Love
programme.desc: From the day Pauline (Clemence Poésy) lends him a helping hand on the bus, the stubborn and weary Matthew Morgan (Sir Michael Caine) stumbles back to happiness.

programme.title: Blind
programme.desc: Bestselling novelist, Bill Oakland loses his wife and his sight in a vicious car crash. Five years later Socialite Suzanne Dutchman is forced to read to Bill in an intimate room three times a week as a plea bargain for being associated with her husband's insider trading.

programme.title: Bridge to Terabithia
programme.desc: Jesse and Leslie are schoolmates who create an imaginary world of monsters, trolls, ogres, and giants.

programme.title: Valerian and the City of a Thousand Planets
programme.desc: A dark force threatens Alpha, a vast metropolis and home to species from a thousand planets.

programme.title: The Princess Bride
programme.desc: A farmboy-turned-pirate encounters obstacles and enemies in his quest to be reunited with his true love.

programme.title: The Curse of Sleeping Beauty
programme.desc: Thomas unexpectedly inherits a property with a mysterious curse.

programme.title: Joseph and Mary
programme.desc: During a time of much civil unrest, a holy man, Rabbi Elijah, swears an oath to protect the two young sons of a persecuted man. But while Jesus survives King Herod's slaughter of the innocents, it tragically claims the lives of the boys Elijah swore to protect.Seeking to avenge their deaths, he begins his quest for retribution. But when he meets Joseph, Mary and their young son Jesus, the anger that fuels his revenge is questioned. Elijah is faced with a life-changing choice: should he kill, or should he choose forgiveness, and in doing so, contradict every scripture upheld by his forefathers? With a powerful performance from Kevin Sorbo (Hercules, God's Not Dead), Joseph and Mary, is a stirring story of inspiration and hope, and of mercy versus revenge, set in the years before Jesus became the man who ultimately changed the course of humanity forever.

programme.title: Santa Stole Our Dog
programme.desc: A magical holiday adventure featuring original Christmas songs by Dolly Parton, and starring Golden Globe winner, Ed Asner (Elf, Up). The Whitehaven family embark on a whirlwind adventure to the North Pole when their beloved dog, Rusty, goes missing on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Christmas Ransom
programme.desc: In this festive comedy for the whole family, a pair of bumbling crooks break into a toy store on the verge of closing, and take the struggling owner hostage. Little do they know that two hideaway kids have also been locked in the store. With Christmas on the line, the kids team up with a heavily pregnant security officer in a series of hilarious and heartwarming escapades. Can they outwit the thieves and save both the store, and Christmas?

programme.title: The Nights Before Christmas
programme.desc: In this Christmas set horror, a pair of crazed killers have written a very special 'naughty' list of targets. You better watch out, as now they've checked it twice, all sorts of festive hell is about to break loose! When a series of murders in the run up to Christmas are found to be linked, FBI Special Agent Natalie Parker is tasked with tracking a pair of psychotic serial killers. But she soon discovers the couple are not only crazy, having met in and escaped from an asylum for the criminally insane, but have based their personas on Santa and Mrs Claus. As Christmas approaches, they slaughter their way through their special naughty list, playing a cat and mouse game with the FBI and leaving a trail of gruesome bloody bodies in their wake.

programme.title: The Santa Con
programme.desc: Small-time con man Nick DeMarco is ordered to take a minimum-wage job.

programme.title: Holiday Spin
programme.desc: Ralph Macchio stars as a former dance champion sidelined years ago by an injury.

programme.title: THE FLIGHT BEFORE CHRISTMAS
programme.desc: Stephanie is originally planning to spend the holidays moving.

programme.title: The Santa Con
programme.desc: Small-time con man Nick DeMarco is ordered to take a minimum-wage job.

programme.title: The Final Stand
programme.desc: 1917 meets Hacksaw Ridge. A gripping and hard hitting WWII thriller based on the unbelievable true story. This historical action epic follows a group of Russian soldiers who were deployed to the front line, to fight with the Soviet Army to defend Moscow against the onslaught of the Nazi advance in 1941. Hopelessly outnumbered, thousands bravely put their lives on the line in this heroic battle.

programme.title: Assassin
programme.desc: Danny Dyer (Eastenders) is back on top form in Assassin, a brutal, hard-hitting story of Jamie, a former hitman out for revenge. Starring Martin Kemp (The Krays), Gary Kemp (The World's End), and from the producers of Rise of the Footsoldier and Goodfellas, Assassin is the story of the most corrupt crime bosses in the London underworld, and one man's crusade to bring them to justice.

programme.title: The Birthday Cake
programme.desc: This hard-hitting mob-drama stars Ewan McGregor (Trainspotting), Val Kilmer (Top Gun) and William Fichtner (Prison Break). Gio, the son of a murdered mobster and the nephew of Brooklyn mob boss, carries on the family tradition of bringing a celebration cake to his uncle's house. But Gio's life changes forever as he begins to piece together what really happened to his father.

programme.title: Summer of Love
programme.desc: Fresh, fun and witty, this coming of age story centres around 16-year old Jamie (Joey King: The Kissing Booth), and her family who are left reeling after her calculating grandmother (Academy Award nominated June Squibb: Nebraska) unveils an array of family secrets on her deathbed. Jamie must navigate her troublesome love life and closest friendships in the midst of her family crisis.

programme.title: Level 16
programme.desc: A shocking dystopian thriller, mashing together the disturbing world of The Handmaid's Tale and Black Mirror to stunning effect. 16-year old Vivien is trapped in The Vestalis Academy, a prison-like boarding school. Reunited with Sophia who previously betrayed her, they embark on the horrifying truth behind their imprisonment. Soon running for their lives, they must save themselves or die.

programme.title: Homemade Christmas
programme.desc: When the opportunity arrives to save a Christmas party and dazzle her crush, Megan must choose between the man of her dreams and Mr. Right. Starring Michelle Argyris (2020)

programme.title: A Christmas Reunion
programme.desc: A high-flying executive returns home to a Christmas surprise: her former high-school sweetheart has inherited the other half of her aunt's bakery. Stars Denise Richards, Patrick Muldoon (2015)

programme.title: The Santa Squad
programme.desc: An out of work art teacher accepts a job with the Santa Squad to help a wealthy widower and his two daughters rediscover the magic of Christmas. Starring Aaron Ashmore (2020)

programme.title: Spotlight on Christmas
programme.desc: A Hollywood actress returns to her hometown during the holidays after a public break-up. Once there, Olivia finally takes a starring role in her own life. Starring Tori Anderson (2020)

programme.title: Her Pen Pal
programme.desc: Victoria is in Paris for friend's wedding, but she needs a date to make her ex believe she's over him, will Jacques her childhood French pen pal assist her in this ruse? (2021)

programme.title: My One and Only
programme.desc: Stephanie enters a TV reality show to discover "the one". Stephanie discovers her inner strength to go for the things she wants, not what others think she should have. (2019)

programme.title: Sweet Home Carolina
programme.desc: Diane is a struggling single mom in LA. Just when things are at there worst, she inherits a house, but she will have to live in small town USA and take care of a dog.

programme.title: A Winter Princess
programme.desc: Princess Carly, working incognito at a ski resort, must team up with the owner's brother, Jesse, to plan the resort's 50th anniversary celebration.

programme.title: Rome in Love
programme.desc: Amelie high profile role, to play Audrey Hepburn's character in a remake of Roman Holiday has gained press attention. Can she keep her identity under wraps whilst in Rome? (2019)

programme.title: PASSIONATE SUMMER
programme.desc: An idealistic young schoolmaster arrives at a Jamaican boarding school.

programme.title: THE DIVORCE OF LADY X
programme.desc: Laurence Olivier plays Logan, a divorce lawyer, stranded in overcrowded hotel.

programme.title: FLOODS OF FEAR
programme.desc: The Humbolt River is bursting its banks and flooding the American town of Lebannon. Three men cling to the wreckage of a dyke and one, Donovan, rescues Elizabeth, a young girl trapped near her home.

programme.title: BOYS IN BROWN
programme.desc: An all-star cast spearhead this exercise in social realism. Jackie (Richard Attenborough) dreams of marrying the girl across the street but, in a bid to escape the poverty trap, agrees to participate in a robbery that goes wrong

programme.title: DUBLIN NIGHTMARE
programme.desc: A photographer investigates the murder of his friend that occurred during a Dublin bank robbery.

programme.title: The Cobbler
programme.desc: Max Simkin repairs shoes in the same New York shop that has been in his family for generations.

programme.title: Just My Luck
programme.desc: Sexy Manhattanite Ashley is known as the luckiest woman around, but after a chance romantic encounter with down-and-out Jake, she realizes that she's swapped her fortune for his.

programme.title: Runaway Jury
programme.desc: Set in New Orleans, this is the story of a mysterious man, Nick Easter. Nick gets himself not only on the jury of a landmark case against a gun manufacturer, but as the foreman, in an attempt to influence the other jury members to vote a certain way.

programme.title: The Patriot
programme.desc: It is South Carolina, and the spirit of 1776 fills the air throughout the thirteen American colonies. Rebellion is brewing, taxation from the British crown is taking a toll on the American colonists, and a conflict with England is inevitable.

programme.title: The International
programme.desc: An Interpol agent (Owen) attempts to expose a high-profile financial institution's role in an international arms dealing ring.

programme.title: Underworld: Blood Wars
programme.desc: The fifth installment of the Underworld franchise.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels
programme.desc: They're beautiful, they're brilliant and they work for Charlie.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels
programme.desc: They're beautiful, they're brilliant and they work for Charlie.

programme.title: The Girl With The Dragon Tattoo
programme.desc: Journalist Mikael Blomkvist is aided in his search for a woman who has been missing for forty years by Lisbeth Salander, a young computer hacker.

programme.title: The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Jennifer Aniston and Gerard Butler, two exes continually one-up each other until they find themselves on the run for their lives.

programme.title: Man Of The House (2005)
programme.desc: A hard-edged Texas Ranger is forced to go undercover as an assistant cheerleading coach to protect a group of college cheerleaders after they witness a murder.

programme.title: Man Of The House (2005)
programme.desc: A hard-edged Texas Ranger is forced to go undercover as an assistant cheerleading coach to protect a group of college cheerleaders after they witness a murder.

programme.title: Just One Of The Guys
programme.desc: Aspiring entrepreneurs pitch their business ideas to moguls, known as the "Sharks," in hopes of landing investment funds in this U.S. adaptation of the British and Japanese reality hit Dragons' Den.

programme.title: Slipaway
programme.desc: When a homeless young musician moves into a sailboat with a feisty elderly widow, the two must overcome their differences and haunting pasts to unlock each other's dreams.

programme.title: Love and Honor
programme.desc: While fighting in Vietnam, Dalton hears his girlfriend back home has dumped him. He has a week's leave coming up so decides to fly to get her back. AWOL from the war zone, he has seven days to get back to the US, change his girlfriend's mind and make it back to Vietnam without anyone noticing.

programme.title: Life of a King
programme.desc: Ex-felon, Eugene Brown, establishes a Chess Club for inner city teenagers in Washington, D.C.

programme.title: The Homesman
programme.desc: Hilary Swank† and Meryl Streep‡ star in this action epic set in America's West in the 1850's. Mary Bee Cuddy is an independent frontier woman, living a life of solitude. When three women are declared insane by the local preacher.

programme.title: In Time
programme.desc: In a future where time is literally money and aging stops at 25, the only way to stay alive is to earn, steal, or inherit more time.

programme.title: Killers
programme.desc: Spencer Aimes is just your average, undercover, super-assassin accustomed to a life of flashy sports cars and even flashier women. But when he meets Jen Kornfeldt, a fun-loving computer tech, he finds true love… and happily trades international intrigue for domestic bliss.

programme.title: Hours
programme.desc: When his beloved wife dies in childbirth, Nolan (Paul Walker) is left to care for their newborn on his own while Hurricane Katrina simultaneously devastates the coast of Louisiana.

programme.title: Bleeding Steel
programme.desc: Special Forces agent Lin Dong (Jackie Chan) becomes embroiled in a high-tech conspiracy as he attempts to protect a crucial witness. Just as he gets closer to discovering the truth, Lin Dong is lucky to escape with his life when he is pursued by a mysterious and heavily-armed militia.

programme.title: Mehek
programme.desc: Zindagi Ki Mehek is an Indian television drama series that aired from 2016 to 2018. The story revolves around Mehek Sharma, a talented cook from a middle-class family, and Shaurya Khanna, a wealthy and arrogant restaurateur. Their paths cross when Mehek participates in a cooking competition that Shaurya is judging. Despite their contrasting personalities and initial conflicts, they fall in love and face numerous challenges together, including family opposition and personal vendettas. The show blends themes of love, family, and ambition with a strong emphasis on culinary arts.

programme.title: Dholi Beats
programme.desc: The story revolves around Geet, a young woman who follows her father's footsteps as a dhol player, challenging societal norms about gender roles in music. Her journey is supported by her husband, Malhar, who helps her pursue her dreams.

programme.title: King of Hearts
programme.desc: Jamai Raja is an Indian drama series about Siddharth, who marries Roshni to mend her strained relationship with her mother, Durga Devi Patel. The show explores the complexities of family dynamics, love, and duty as Siddharth navigates various challenges to unite his new family.

programme.title: Second Chances
programme.desc: Yash, a rich and esteemed business tycoon, yearns for real love. While he falls in love with Neha, the journey ahead is not going to be an easy one for him. Will he be able to win Nehas heart?

programme.title: Jodha Akbar
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.title: This is Fate
programme.desc: Arjun spends time with Preeta and the Aroras. When he returns home, Anjali overhears him confessing his feelings for Preeta alone in the car.

programme.title: Trinayani
programme.desc: Trinayani is a woman who can see the future. She decides to use her power to make other peoples lives better. How will things turn out for her when people learn about her extraordinary abilities?

programme.title: The Good Son
programme.desc: Raja Beta is an Indian television drama series that revolves around the life of Vedant Tripathi, an ideal and dutiful son. Vedant is adopted by the Tripathi family and grows up to become a successful gynecologist. Despite facing challenges and prejudice due to his adopted status, he wins the love and respect of his family through his unwavering dedication, kindness, and sense of responsibility.

programme.title: Animals That Changed History
programme.desc: Animals That Changed History - Season 1 - Beasts of Burden: About twelve thousand years ago, before the Neolithic Revolution, humans were mainly hunter-gatherers. Among the animals we hunted were the wild aurochs, the ancestor of all domestic cattle. The domestication of cows led to the use of oxen as draught animals that could help farmers plough fields.

programme.title: Animals That Changed History
programme.desc: Animals That Changed History - Season 1 - Companionship: Throughout history, humans have surrounded themselves with animals. But there are two species that are our undeniable favourites. Every dog today was once a wolf - genetically speaking. Wolves and hominids met as early as 400,000 years ago. Ancient hunter-gatherers and wolves competed for the same prey, and used the same tracking techniques.

programme.title: The Tree of Trees
programme.desc: Its top resembles a cathedral vault it has been revered as the symbol of fortitude, wisdom, perseverance, and power of resistance. Its life cycle comprises almost 10 human life spans and provides space for more than 500 different species of animals and plants. It is the tree of trees: the oak tree.

programme.title: The Beauty and Mystery of the East
programme.desc: This 3,000 kilometre journey takes us to legendary oriental metropolises. Being routes less travelled, the impressive desert and mountainous areas of Iran and Uzbekistan are a traveller's dream destination. In the desert city of Yazd we encounter places and traditions of the Persian Zoroastrian religion.

programme.title: The Pamir Highway
programme.desc: The Central Asian Pamir Highway has many surprises in store for its travellers. Our journey will take us some 1,300 kilometres, beginning in Tajikistan, then down the River Panj along the border with Afghanistan and on to Kyrgyzstan.

programme.title: The Grand Trunk Road
programme.desc: This journey takes us along the precolonial Grand Trunk Road, which stretches across the entire Indian subcontinent. We begin in the mangrove forests of the Bay of Bengal, moving on to Kolkata for the colourful religious festival Durga Puja.

programme.title: Biomimicry

programme.title: Europe's Wilderness
programme.desc: The Bearded Vulture is one of the largest birds of prey in Europe and one of the rarest. With its habitat above the treeline in the alpine mountains, we see one of the largest airworthy birds fly loops during its courtship days and flight for survival on the steep slopes.

programme.title: Secret Seychelles: D'Arros
programme.desc: D'Arros is one of the Seychelles' best kept secrets. Teaming with wildlife, it's home to rare giant tortoises, hawksbill turtles and shearwaters. In the depths, dolphins, greater hammerhead and tiger sharks roam. Now designated as a wildlife reserve, this natural treasure trove has the recognition it so rightly deserves, and this film is a beautiful celebration of its bounty.

programme.title: Bucketlist Australia
programme.desc: If Australia makes you think of beaches and BBQs, cricket and cork hats, you haven't seen anything yet. Giant deserts, ancient rainforest, tropical coasts and mystical rock formations. And not forgetting some of the weirdest and most wonderful animals on the planet. From iconic kangaroos and emus to the fearsome cassowary and cuddly koalas, you can find creatures here that you'll find nowhere else on the planet. There's only one place where you can find all these bucket list encounters – Australia!

programme.title: Code Breaker
programme.desc: In this epsiode Craig and Nicola witness a pride of lion feeding on a rotten hippo carcass while displaying visual cues of defense. The two observe the defensive behavior of elephants toward a pride of lion.

programme.title: Wild Moments
programme.desc: Wildlife filmmakers often risk life and limb trying to capture unique images of their dangerous protagonists. In the Kruger National Park Josef Jozefowicz steps into a lionesses' den to film her cubs, in Alaska Andreas Kieling mingles with giant elk bulls in order to film them in action, and in Florida his colleague Zoltan Török gets very close to an alligator mother guarding its nest. The life of the film-makers is also threatened by elemental forces, and failing technical equipment: the strong and tearing current of the Yukon River throws Andreas Kieling's boat onto a gravel bank, in the Democratic Republik of Congo camerawoman Heike Grebe is separated from her colleagues in the dense rainforest, in Kamchatka a film team only just escapes a gigantic landslide, and in Finland a hot-air balloon catches fire and becomes the nightmare of Oliver Goetzl and Ivo Nörenberg. The last episode "Wild Moments - Dangerous and Deadly" follows wildlife film-makers on their adventurous journeys throughout the world.

programme.title: Dust And Stripes
programme.desc: In a never-ending quest for grass and water, the striped herds undertake an annual epic trek across the vast lunar landscape of the Kalahari's Makgadikgadi Pans. Most of the year, the Makgadikgadi is an inhospitable wasteland of windswept, salt-encrusted pans. For the area's water-dependent zebra, the Boteti River on the western edge of the pans is a dry-season lifeline. However, it is also a death trap, with lions waiting in ambush and crocodiles lurking in dark riverside caves.

programme.title: King of the Seas
programme.desc: The times where eagles have been seen as varmints are over. They are now perceived as an integral part of the food cycle. Due to the fact that the habitats of the sea eagles in Germany are largely found in the north-eastern regions that are rich in water, the movie accompanies the eagles to an island, home to hundreds of sea ravens, where they rob the baby sea ravens of their food. They seem to always profit from the successes of the fellow creatures in their habitats. This film introduces you to the expert poachers of the animal kingdom.

programme.title: Masai Mara: The Big Hunt
programme.desc: When food supply in the Serengeti dwindles, the Masai Mara is a paradise for predators. As the black wildebeests, gazelles, zebras and antelopes make their yearly trip from the south of the Serengeti to the north, nature's best laid trap, the Mara River in Kenya is waiting ahead. Captivating shots filmed under water show how crocodiles prepare for the Big Hunt while other predators lurk on the banks awaiting their bounty. The biggest problems for the migratory animals are the Mara and the Tarek River, where they have to put their lives at risk to get to the other side. A great number of them die as they jump into the river and break their legs, while others are carried away by the drift or drown. Those who are not victims of the river itself risk falling prey to the crocodiles. We entered this unchartered territory, the crocodile domain by heading under water. Follow these predators in and around their habitat and watch prides of lions map out their game plan. In slow-motion, we show you the final showdown between predator and prey. Will it be a successful hunt or will the hoofed animals persevere?

programme.title: The Dying King
programme.desc: In the open wilderness of Africa, there are only 20.000 lions living a free life. In the last decade, humans have killed hundreds of thousands– mostly for purely hunting purposes. In the last couple of years, a new industry has developed called the canned hunting, where animals are bred for 4-5 years then released into a confined area. This confined area is created for the sole purpose optimizing the odds of the hunter obtaining a kill. The corpse of the dead, often male, lion is thereby treated as a trophy. Tourists pay up to 40, 000 USD for this 'privilege'.

programme.title: Wild Moments
programme.desc: As an animal filmmaker, one often deals with lots of strange old birds. No wonder, that so much can go wrong. After a long day of filming, a surprise awaits at the camp: Wolves have been looking for chocolate biscuits! Yet these are not the only things that can happen in the Arctic. Yann Sochaczewski is out and about in the magnificent Grand Canyon. On his raft on the Colorado River, he risks life and limb in doing so. In Australia, Thoralf Grospitz and Jens Westphalen play cat and mouse with an odd bird, that turns out to be a real entertainer. In the Serengeti, Reinhard Radke despairs of the many tourists who constantly walk in front of his lens. Wildlife filmmakers travel around the world for these very encounters. They bring nature into our living rooms, experience the beautiful, the saddest and the most poignant moments. And many funny ones.

programme.title: Wild Moments
programme.desc: When humans and wild animals live next door to one another, things can sometimes be a little hairy. Some organise themselves in impertinent gangs, others mutually cultivate their own friendships. In New Zealand, keas organise themselves into gangs and obviously have it in for all the rubber seals belonging to winter sports enthusiasts. Their motto: nibble all you can. In Australia, Klaus Weißmann and Rolf Sziringer struggle with a huge invasion. Thousands of flies have taken a liking to the two men. This causes frayed nerves. And in Zambia, Jens Westphalen and Thoralf Grospitz capture a veritable display of elephants with the camera. Every year, their fine noses lead them into a hotel garden - in which the fruits on the wild mango tree are ripe. But, there is a catch: To get to their picnic, they have to walk through the lobby. This is what happens when buildings are erected around even older premises.

programme.title: Super Senses

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: We find out about the animals that live in the shadows and the adaptations they need to survive. Nocturnal animals have taken to this dark world for good reason. You need some special abilities to cope with the lack of light.

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: We find out more about the animals that have their feet firmly planted on or under the ground. And find out how their senses are tuned to survive. What we see above the ground is only a small part of the natural world.
